both.desc: Record both microphone and system audio
both.label: Mixed Audio

errors.invalidState: Switch failed: Current state does not allow switching audio source
errors.notSupported: Switch failed: Current browser does not support this audio source

audioSource.switchFailedButRecovered: Failed to switch audio source, but previous source was kept and recording continues

system.desc: Record system audio only (via screen share)
system.label: System Audio
